caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands before a solid black background. She is wearing a light green tunic adorned with small red floral patterns and an embroidered neckline, paired with a dark beaded necklace. A small black lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. In the bottom left and center of the scene, a small circular logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible. Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking, with her mouth opening and closing and her facial expressions shifting slightly. Her head remains centered in the frame, and her shoulders are visible. There are no other people or objects in the scene, and the background remains static as she delivers her presentation.
